test_completeness.enumeration_basis: One row per behaviour introduced or changed by the diff: 4 component-level class contracts (desktop trigger x3, phone trigger x1), 3 real-browser geometry outcomes, and 4 ratchet guarantees. Derived by walking the diff file-by-file; the two component files change only the trigger + wrapper className, the two test files and the two new test artifacts add exactly these assertions.

surface_verification.justification: UI-only change to a rendered control, so the class fence in jsdom cannot prove the outcome (no stylesheet is applied there). Executed e2e/flows/create-cta-parity.spec.ts in real Chromium against an isolated stack (temp USERPROFILE, Hono 127.0.0.1:3849, Vite 127.0.0.1:5179, SHIPWRIGHT_NETWORK_PROFILE=local): 3 passed. Verified load-bearing by re-running against stashed pre-fix code — 2 of 3 failed (height 34.8 vs 36, bg rgb(53,184,164) vs rgb(14,122,107)) and the untouched split-button test correctly stayed green.
